text.title: Scope-Creep Park List Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Scope-Creep Park List Template end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: open-walkthrough
step.action: State the decision-ask + the parking convention at meeting open.

step.name: capture-off-scope
step.action: Acknowledge with the canonical line; write the row with owner + revisit_gate.

step.name: close-meeting-with-recap
step.action: Recap parked items + revisit-gate at meeting close.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit to the park-list store.

step.name: review-at-sprint-planning
step.action: Each row graduates to backlog / log / closed.
